title: Trashlib
description: A library mod that adds utility methods that are used by trashoflevillage mods.
body: A library mod that adds utility methods for mod developers to use for things such as initialization, datagen, and many other things that I found annoying in modding. This was made for use in my own mods, and not beyond that, so it might not be very useful to other developers. Regardless, [I've documented it](https://github.com/trashoflevillage/trashlib/wiki).
